name: supabase-backend
description: A backend powered by Supabase with PostgreSQL, Row Level Security, Edge Functions, and built-in auth. Structured for teams building SaaS or consumer apps that need a managed database, real-time subscriptions, and file storage without running their own infrastructure.
unified_instruction:
# Supabase Backend

## Stack
- **Database**: PostgreSQL (via Supabase)
- **Auth**: Supabase Auth (email, magic link, OAuth providers)
- **Edge Functions**: Deno (TypeScript)
- **Storage**: Supabase Storage
- **Client**: @supabase/supabase-js
- **Local Dev**: Supabase CLI

## Project Structure
```
supabase/
  migrations/      # Versioned SQL migration files
  functions/       # Edge Functions (one dir per function)
  seed.sql         # Local dev seed data
  config.toml      # Supabase project config
src/
  lib/supabase.ts  # Typed client singleton
  types/           # Generated database types
```

## Conventions
- RLS is enabled on every table — no exceptions
- Use the anon key in the client; the service role key only in trusted server environments
- Generate TypeScript types after every migration: `supabase gen types typescript`
- All schema changes go through a migration file — never edit the schema directly in the dashboard
- Edge Functions handle secrets via environment variables set in the Supabase dashboard

## Key Commands
```bash
supabase start                        # Start local Supabase stack
supabase db diff --file <name>        # Generate migration from schema changes
supabase migration up                 # Apply pending migrations locally
supabase gen types typescript > src/types/database.ts  # Regenerate types
supabase functions serve <name>       # Run Edge Function locally
```
